statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow Upgrade slice around Garage restore safety.

Changed:
- `garage.js`: validates backup section shapes before restore, skips invalid recognized sections, restores only valid sections, and filters diagnostic activity before the six-item display cap.
- `garage.html` / `styles.css`: adds clearer restore impact preview: â€œWill replaceâ€, â€œWill mergeâ€, â€œSkipped invalidâ€, plus a reminder to download a backup before restoring.
- `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1`: adds static coverage for the new pre-restore safety note.
- `service-worker.js`: bumped cache to `ridgeline-console-v270`.
- Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`, and `ANTON.md`.

Verification:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Playwright/Chrome fallback passed for Garage restore validation on iPhone and desktop, including invalid-only rejection, mixed valid/invalid preview, skipped invalid service log, valid partial restore, photo `dataUrl` stripping, no horizontal overflow, and area filter visibility beyond the six-item cap.
- Existing Edge `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1 -Pages garage.html` still fails at the known `--dump-dom` missing-main render issue.

Screenshots captured:
- `debug-screenshots/audit-v270-garage-restore-validation-mobile.png`
- `debug-screenshots/audit-v270-garage-restore-complete-mobile.png`
- `debug-screenshots/audit-v270-garage-restore-desktop.png`

Next clean slice: turn this Playwright restore-validation fallback into reusable audit tooling so future Garage restore changes are covered without one-off scripts.
